metaData.Key Information:
ARCOS range of kitchen gadgets are professional tools designed for a specific purpose and function in the kitchen. They are practical and innovative, and are a great addition to any professional or domestic kitchen. The food contact area is made of Stainless Steel with the handle in finished Polypropylene.

The 117 mm corer will help you to core different types of fruit. It is easy to use thanks to its ergonomic design and light weight. Take your preparations to the top and give them a superior aesthetic that delights beyond the palate.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place .

metaData.Key Information: The quality of the pan emphasizes the flavor of the recipe. That's why it's so important that you have the Tramontina Loreto aluminum pan in your kitchen. With aluminum body with Starflon Max non-stick internal and external coating, with a thickness that provides fast and uniform cooking of food. Its non-stick coating is not harmful to health and ensures that food does not stick to its surface, as it is easy to clean. The bakelite handle is heat-resistant, allowing safe handling, as it does not heat up. In addition, it is resistant, durable and super practical, dishwasher safe.
metaData.SAP Product Name: Tramontina Loreto 28cm Non Stick Chinese Wok

metaData.Key Information:
ARCOS range of kitchen gadgets are professional tools designed for a specific purpose and function in the kitchen. They are practical and innovative, and are a great addition to any professional or domestic kitchen. The food contact area is made of Stainless Steel with the handle in finished Polypropylene.
The corer performs the function indicated by its name, removes the core from most fruits, taking the stone and its seeds with it in almost all cases. In this way, you will be able to eat everything that is left of it. You will have your favorite fruits ready to eat without worrying about biting into a seed or its core.
metaData.Storage Information: Store in cool and dry place .
